options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <objectType> # Object type (string, required) <objectName> # Object name (string, required) <llx> # lower left x coordinate of the object (float, required) <lly> # lower left y coordinate of the object (float, required) <urx> # upper right x coordinate of the object (float, required) <ury> # upper right y coordinate of the object

options.name: -no_snap_to_grid
options.description: Specify to not honor snap rules
